Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Prince Indah - Mirima (Official Video) sms SKIZA 9846021 to 811
snippet.description:
Timeless Anthems: Prince Indah’s Sixth Studio Masterpiece

In the heart of timeless elegance, Timeless Anthems—the sixth album from Kenyan Ohangla icon Prince Indah emerges as a symphony of enduring rhythms and heartfelt storytelling. Adorned with an hourglass motif symbolizing eternity and flanked by grand bookshelves evoking wisdom’s vast library, the album’s artwork captures Prince Indah in regal crimson velvet, exuding poise and passion. 
This collection weaves traditional Luo melodies with modern pulses, crafted to resonate across generations, produced under the Malaika Music banner for a sound that’s both nostalgic and boundary-breaking.
Spanning 16 tracks, Timeless Anthems invites listeners into a world of love, reflection, and cultural pride. Standouts include the soulful opener "Ngima Dhano," the vibrant "Atieno Nyar Chula" paired with "Mama Love" the introspective "Pedeshe (Ajawa Marwa)," and the uplifting "Believe Me." 
Deeper cuts like "Rapudo,"  "Berna" (Above & Beyond), "Jofitina," "Mirima," "Jaherana ft Zegge Delongeur," "Nyasuba," "Jambaka," and the tender closer "Nyi Luo" and "I Love You" deliver anthemic hooks that linger long after the final note.
Set for its grand launch on November 8, 2025, this album is more than music—it’s a celebration of heritage reimagined for the future. Let Prince Indah’s voice carry you into infinity.

Artist: Prince Indah
Title: Timeless Anthems
Producer : Teddy B
Stream: https://tr.ee/Timeless_Anthems-Album_...
©EMC 2026

snippet.title: DJ KEZZ FT MSANII MUSIC GROUP - USHUHUDA [ Official Music Video ]
snippet.description:
USHUHUDA is a song of testimony, NOT JUST FOR Dj Kezz and the Msanii Music Group team but  for anyone  with praise when reflecting on the valleys we walked through and the God who carried us through them.

There were moments we thought we wouldn’t make it.
Moments the road felt dark and uncertain.
But somehow… we are still standing.

“Look at us now… huu ni ushuhuda.”

This song is for anyone who has ever cried, prayed, doubted, and still found themselves on the other side of the storm.

What once felt impossible became proof of His faithfulness.

May this song remind you:
The valley is not the end of the story.

🎶 Artist: DJ Kezz ft Msanii Music Group
🎥 Official Music Video
📍 2026

If this song blessed you, share your testimony in the comments.
Subscribe and walk this journey with us.

#Ushuhuda #DJKezz #gospelmusic  #testimony  #kenyanmusic #msanii #msaniimusicgroup #djkezzkenya

snippet.title: Bridget Blue – NI WEWE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
NI WEWE, a heartfelt love anthem that celebrates certainty, devotion, and choosing one person in a world full of noise.

This is not just a love song. It’s a confession. It’s that moment when you stop searching and realize… it’s you.

With emotionally rich vocals, cinematic visuals, and a mature sound that blends modern Afro-R&B with soulful East African influence, NI WEWE captures what it feels like to love with intention and clarity.

If you’ve ever looked at someone and known deep inside this is my person, this song is for you.

🎧 Stream NI WEWE here:
https://onerpm.link/Niwewe-BridgetBlue

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
